title: Goodyear Wet & Dry 12V Vacuum Cleaner - Powerful Car Vacuum with Multi-Surface Cleaning Capability| Compact Design| Convenient 12V Power Adapter| Easily clean liquid spills, dust, dirt, pet hair, mud
features: Transform your car cleaning experience with the GOODYEAR Wet & Dry 12V Vacuum Cleaner. This versatile vacuum is designed to tackle both wet and dry messes, making it an essential tool for maintaining a spotless and fresh vehicle interior. Easily clean up spills, crumbs, and dust without switching tools, ensuring your car is always in pristine condition.

Reliable Power Source: The Goodyear car vacuum cleaner provides 12V power adapter provides a consistent and dependable power supply, ensuring uninterrupted cleaning performance. Simply plug it into your vehicle’s 12V power outlet (cigarette lighter socket) for immediate use.

Extended Reach: The car vacuum cleaner long nozzle provides an extended reach, making it easy to clean between seats, under furniture, and in tight corners. Its slim design allows you to access narrow gaps and crevices with ease. Made from durable, high-quality materials, the long nozzle is built to withstand regular use

With its versatile multi-surface cleaning capability, this vacuum is designed to handle both wet and dry messes .Wet & Dry Functionality: Effortlessly clean up spills, stains, and liquid messes with the vacuum’s advanced wet cleaning feature. Switch to dry mode for dust, dirt, and debris, ensuring a comprehensive clean no matter the type of mess.

Compact & Lightweight: The car vacuum compact design and lightweight build make it easy to maneuver and store, ideal for both on-the-go and home use. User-Friendly Design: Engineered for effortless operation, with intuitive controls and a simple setup process, making cleaning hassle-free.
description: GOODYEAR Wet & Dry 12V Vacuum Cleaner. Engineered for versatility and power, this vacuum is your go-to solution for maintaining a spotless vehicle interior and handling various messes with ease. Powerful Performance: Designed with a high-performance motor, this vacuum delivers robust suction to tackle both wet and dry messes. Efficiently clean liquid spills, dust, dirt, pet hair, and mud, ensuring your car remains in pristine condition. Multi-Surface Cleaning: Equipped to handle a wide range of surfaces, this vacuum excels in cleaning upholstery, carpets, and hard-to-reach areas. Its versatile design makes it suitable for all types of car interiors, providing thorough and effective cleaning. Compact Design: The sleek and compact design ensures easy maneuverability and storage. Its lightweight construction allows you to effortlessly navigate around your vehicle, reaching tight spots and corners without hassle. Convenient 12V Power Adapter: Powered by a 12V adapter, this vacuum plugs directly into your car’s power outlet. Enjoy the convenience of continuous cleaning power without the need for batteries or frequent recharging. Effortless Cleaning: Easily switch between cleaning tasks with the vacuum’s intuitive controls. The powerful suction combined with a range of attachments ensures that every mess is handled efficiently. Durable and Reliable: Built with high-quality materials, the GOODYEAR Wet & Dry Vacuum Cleaner is designed to withstand regular use and deliver long-lasting performance.
